author: PC Gamer
text:
After leading the studio through 2 rounds of layoffs and 1 game release, the CEO of Supermassive is stepping down
He's also stepping down from his role at Supermassive parent Nordisk, so he can spend the summer with his family.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Xbox marketing takes embarrassing turn with new Call of Duty ads loudly disclaiming 'NOT ON XBOX GAME PASS THIS YEAR'
My 'NOT ON XBOX GAME PASS THIS YEAR' ad has people wondering a lot of things about my business strategy already clarified by my ad.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Hideki Kamiya thinks there should be a cozy Resident Evil game, where 'retired Leon goes fishing in the countryside'
It's cool if someone else makes it, as long as he gets to play it.

author: PC Gamer
text:
World's smartest Meccha Chameleon player bamboozles opponents by not disguising themselves at all: 'Hiding is for amateurs'
There is an imposter among us.

author: PC Gamer
text:
All +1 Speed Keyboard Escape codes for June 2026: Extra speed
All active +1 Speed Keyboard Escape codes for free speed boosts and multipliers.

author: PC Gamer
text:
New Vegas director Josh Sawyer says games can and should pull on artistic inspirations from 'anywhere and everywhere': 'Greek plays, they knocked it out of the park thousands of years ago—why not look at them?'
If you want the player to feel something, look to media that already cracked the code.

author: PC Gamer
text:
5 years after we called this Kickstarted MMO 'a giant fiasco' and just 3 months after it finally launched, it's shutting down
Even the shutdown process is turning into a mess.

author: PC Gamer
text:
We finally got our first good look at Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2, and I hate to break it to you but I don't think this one's gonna have a happy ending either
Looking preem, choom.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Steam Machine Companion Cube case cancelled because Dbrand didn't ask Valve for permission to make it: 'We’re going to regret that decision for a very long time'
This was definitely not a triumph.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Logitech G316 X (tactile) gaming keyboard review
Oh what could have been.

author: PC Gamer
text:
With a dumpster-truck full of cash, New Vegas director Josh Sawyer would probably make a 'spiritual successor' to a crunchy 1992 RPG
So long as he liked the team he was making it with, anyway.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Yet another Marvel Rivals creator tournament gets overshadowed by drama, except this time there was $300,000 on the line: 'I got Zazza'd in a tournament 10x the prize pool'
If I had a nickel for every time a high-end prize pool Marvel Rivals tournament was thrown, I'd have two nickels.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Despite having no clue when GTA 6 is coming to PC, 39% of you are more than happy to wait for it
Patience is a virtue.

author: PC Gamer
text:
With the RAMpocalypse set to rage for years, memory kit makers are responding in one of two ways: Do nothing or go hell-for-leather
Neither response is what the PC industry needs right now.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The only fighting game I've ever been excited for is now getting a PC playtest before launch
Marvel Tōkon's still coming to PC despite Sony's retreat.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Memory crisis heads to court: Class-action lawsuit calls Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron DRAM market 'oligopolists', alleging anticompetitive behavior
'No outsider can expand output to undercut them.'

author: PC Gamer
text:
Thermaltake Retro 360 TG case review
Retro chic that doesn't quite hit the mark.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Baldur's Gate 2's co-lead designer was asked to make Baldur's Gate 4 after Larian declined: 'Having to compete against Baldur's Gate 3? That would be insanity'
He declined as well.

author: PC Gamer
text:
I wasn't convinced Cyberpunk: Edgerunners could have a sadder ending until I read its writer's other pitches—and boy did we get off easy
Counting my cyber-blessings.

author: PC Gamer
text:
A Disco Elysium writer once told Josh Sawyer that 'we can do better than this now,' and Sawyer agrees
"We just keep inspiring each other. It's not an animosity thing. It's just, do the best you can, [and] get inspired by other people."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Eager players are pre-ordering GTA 6 for free using 98,000 Microsoft points and one super fan says it was all only possible thanks to Rockstar's delays
"Thank you Rockstar for all the delays."

author: PC Gamer
text:
South Korea's president declares that it will invest over $580 billion in its AI chip industry, with Samsung and SK hynix coughing up most of the money
That's great and all that jazz, but can I have affordable DDR5 and SSDs again, please?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Planescape: Torment 2 was greenlit by Wizards of the Coast, 'they were really into what we were doing', but it refused to fund the sequel, and nobody else was interested
We were robbed of another planar adventure.

author: PC Gamer
text:
YouTuber builds pocket-sized Game Boy emulator using an ereader, demonstrates an 'actually playable' refresh rate for your Pokémon Blue replay
Bet you never thought you'd see an epaper display move this fast.

author: PC Gamer
text:
CD Projekt rebrand makes things simultaneously simpler and more confusing
Please, CD Projekt was my father, call me and my brother CD Projekt Red.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Sony games boss says company will bravely keep sending live services over the top, despite cancelling 8 of the 12 ones planned for 2025 and wiping out most of Destiny 2's developers
"The genre itself is relatively new."

author: PC Gamer
text:
The original version of Dead or Alive 6 was delisted in favor of a rerelease that's currently at 70% negative reviews on Steam: 'Tecmo just sees this as the coomer franchise'
Dead or Alive 6 Last Round doesn't have rollback netcode, but it does have expensive DLC and a photo mode.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Memory prices are predicted to rise as much as 50% in Q3 and it only gets worse from there
I'm gonna be playing low-res indie games for years.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Steam Week in Review: Steam sales are the best time to hoard dozens of forgotten '90s PC gaming oddities
All the interesting Steam facts for the week ending June 28.

author: PC Gamer
text:
After a 4-year wait, Netflix announces Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is coming this fall
I really want to stay at your house. Again.
